query: DELETE FROM drivers WHERE id = 'test-driver-partner'; INSERT INTO drivers (id, name, whatsapp, serviceType, area, capacity, notes, photoUrl, status, isPartner, partnerUntil, isVerified, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES ('partner-1', 'Maria Santos', '11988888888', 'Motorista Particular', 'Holambra', 5, 'Parceira premium', NULL, 'ACTIVE', true, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY), true, NOW(), NOW());
